dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.

agents.summary: USD Layer 1 raw call generated from sealed independent workflow.

conviction_model.final_conviction_logic: Raw conviction (57%) capped by participation (82%), then penalties applied for missing Fed bias (-4) and primary driver conflicts (-7), final conviction rounded to 59%, leaning bullish due to narrow margin and conflicts
